goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 11:45' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'price', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee', 'area', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 11:45 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on saturday and should depart from bishops stortford
Make sure you get train ID, price, and departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of entertainment
Make sure you get entrance fee, area, and address
